nasb.text: So I spoke to the people in the morning, and in the evening my wife died. And in the morning I did as I was commanded.

esv.text: So I spoke to the people in the morning, and at evening my wife died. And on the next morning I did as I was commanded.

cnv.text: 於是我在早上對眾人說了這事，晚上我的妻子就死了；次日早晨我就照著所吩咐我的行了。

ccb.text: 早晨我把这事告诉百姓，晚上我的妻子便死了。次日早晨，我便遵照耶和华的吩咐行。
